summary: Comprehensive testing of FundTrack application completed successfully. Backend APIs tested with 100% success rate (29/29 tests passed). Frontend UI testing completed with excellent results - all major features working correctly including authentication, role-based access control, CRUD operations, charts, filters, and navigation.

design_issues.issue: Menu toggle button timeout during automated testing - may be visibility issue

passed_tests: Authentication endpoints with all user roles
Fund CRUD operations with proper role restrictions
Utilization CRUD operations with proper role restrictions
Dashboard data aggregation and KPI calculations
Login page rendering with Google Sign-In
Dashboard page with KPI cards and charts
Fund List page with search, filters, and table
Reports page with charts and export
User Management page with role dropdowns
